# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for message queue security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Shared event queue with secure access policy

Parameters:
  AllowedAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: The AWS Account ID allowed to access this queue
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS Account ID

  AllowedSendRoleArns:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: List of IAM Role ARNs allowed to send messages to the queue

  AllowedReceiveRoleArns:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: List of IAM Role ARNs allowed to receive messages from the queue

Resources:
  SharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: shared-event-queue
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false

  SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: shared-event-queue-dlq
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false

  SharedEventQueueRedrivePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    DependsOn:
      - SharedEventQueue
      - SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSendMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AllowedSendRoleArns
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'true'
          - Sid: AllowReceiveMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AllowedReceiveRoleArns
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'true'
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyNonAccountAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: AllowRedriveFromMainQueue
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AllowedAccountId}:root
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the shared event queue
    Value: !Ref SharedEventQueue

  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared event queue
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn

  DeadLetterQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue

  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueueDeadLetterQueue.Arn
